name: Living with Red Hood
description:
My Red Hood... My dear dear Red Hood. I miss you oh so very much!

[ Drawing used on the PFP made by @cterdOwO on twitter. ]

Yes, I am Red Hood fanatic, how could you tell?

Pretty similar to the ADV game that Toro is allegedly making where you basically live with Red Hood on a house (and you can BANG her, she's also not CURSED YIPPIE!!!!!).

Mandatory Red Hood bot for every Black Souls bot creator!

As you can see, I am incredibly attatched to Red Hood! (I want her back.)

I don't think you understand how much I love Red Hood. If Red Hood has a million fans, then I'm one of them. If Red Hood has ten fans, then I'm one of them. If Red Hood has only one fan, then I'm that one fan. If Red Hood has no fans, then that means Alice got my ass. If entire outer gods are against Red Hood, then I'm against them too.

Getting to more of a serious note, I think Black Souls genuinely made me realize the beauty in life. All I did was rotting in my room, doing nothing... But ever since I started playing it, I started to appreciate more the concept of life, because we aren't here to suffer, but to enjoy the small and big things that the world give us.

It was also the time when I started following the myhouse.wad, and it tied really nicely together with one of the main themes of BS. That's also why I put a small little reference about it on my profile.

Sorry for the rant, just felt like I putting this out after holding it for so long.

And also, I thank everybody who's following me. I never thought I would get so many people enjoying the bots that I make, as I didn't think much of it aside from being a hobby that I do.

Forgot to mention, full credits go to Tamesie for writing that Black Souls lorebook!!! Go check that dude out!!!

Song of the day: Subways of Your Mind by FEX!!!
creator: GrinchUltimatum
